title: leucanthemopsis pallida subsp. pulverulenta
intro: Leucanthemopsis pallida subsp. pulverulenta, also known as Pulverulent Alpine Daisy, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pulverulent Alpine Daisy include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Leucanthemopsis pallida subsp. pulverulenta include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to address a range of health concerns.
